text.title: Flaky Test Elimination Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply Flaky Test Elimination end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: baseline
step.action: Pull last 30 days of runs for the test; compute flake rate.

step.name: classify
step.action: Walk the 7-bucket taxonomy; pin to one bucket with rationale.

step.name: design-fix
step.action: Match the bucket to its fix family (e.g. timing → wait-for; ordering → setUp isolation; non-determinism → seed).

step.name: implement
step.action: Apply fix; add regression test that fails on the original cause.

step.name: verify
step.action: Run isolated test 50 times; capture pass count.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Write artefact JSON; remove test from flake tally; status=ready_for_review.
